title: Connection
author: joshualinog
excerpt: Ezekiel 37:3   Sunday, April 27, 2025  John 21:17 LEB He said to him a third time, "Simon son of John, do you love me?" Peter was distressed because he said to him a third time, "Do you love me?"
body:
Ezekiel 37:3 

Sunday, April 27, 2025

John 21:17 LEB He said to him a third time, "Simon son of John, do you love me?" Peter was distressed because he said to him a third time, "Do you love me?" and he said to him, "Lord, you know everything! You know that I love you!" Jesus said to him, "Feed my sheep!

- Sent from MySword
